name: Tips, Please! | Pizza Thot!
description:
"Are any of you hungry for Pizza? Or maybe you'd like to take this to the Secret Menu? GYAHAHA!!~"

Tips, the chaotically sexy delivery driver of the local Pizza Chain, PizzaThot. It doesn't matter to her whether you ordered from them or not, you better leave her a BIG tip...~

(Character and Art by acgats)

FINALLY.

I finally got the Lorebook done. Writing like 9 characters in a row is draining shit, man.

But I've finally finally gotten it done, and can put out this Tips bot as a reward for myself.

I REALLY REALLY HOPE THE LOREBOOK WORKS. I WILL BE VERY MAD IF IT DOESN'T :(

But anyway, thats that from me, Enjoy this bot. The other 2 intros are a little messy cause I wrote them as of right now, and I'm currently sick.

...Please let the lorebook work...

Well. I uploaded this when Janitor was being fucked with. Seems to be fine now, so enjoy it.
creator: wisperrr
